Renato Subotic – "The MMA Coach"

Subotic is an MMA coach who entered the United States under a visa waiver program that prohibits compensation – only travel reimbursements are allowed.

Kilmar Abrego Garcia - The “Maryland Man”

- Garcia was illegally in the U.S. and had a lawful deportation order dating back to 2019.  
- In 2020, his wife filed a petition for protection citing three separate instances of domestic violence

- Garicia was arrested and found with rolls of cash and drugs.
